Writesonic

Budget-friendly AI writer with ChatSonic chat, bulk content generation, and new Enterprise plan with quality-based pricing.

Category Writing
Pricing $19/mo Pro
Released October 2021
Affiliate 30% lifetime recurring
Visit Writesonic →

About Writesonic

Writesonic offers AI-powered writing with GPT-4 support at a fraction of competitors' prices. ChatSonic provides real-time web access for research. Features include bulk content generation, AI image creation, and 80+ templates. Recent updates include new Enterprise plan at ,000/month and evolved pricing model that charges differ based on output quality (Premium/Good/Average/Economy). No longer just a GPT-4 wrapper — now combines multiple LLMs including proprietary marketing-tuned models.

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Excellent free tier
  • 30% lifetime recurring affiliate
  • ChatSonic with web access
  • Bulk generation
  • New Enterprise plan at ,000/month
  • Quality-based pricing model (Premium/Good/Average/Economy)
  • Proprietary marketing-tuned LLMs

❌ Cons

  • Output quality below Jasper
  • UI can feel cluttered
  • Inconsistent on long-form

Best For

Freelancers who want solid AI writing on a budget.

writingbloggingsocial mediabudget
